scripts.setup:telegram: python3 tmp/get_chat_id.py && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = 'tmp/get_chat_id.log'; if(!fs.existsSync(file)) return; const output = fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').trim(); if(output.includes('FOUND_CHAT_ID=')) { let env = ''; if(fs.existsSync('.env')) env = fs.readFileSync('.env', 'utf8'); const id = output.match(/FOUND_CHAT_ID=(\d+)/)[1]; if(env.includes('VITE_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=')) { env = env.replace(/VITE_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=.*/, 'VITE_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=' + id); } else { env += '\nVITE_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID=' + id; } fs.writeFileSync('.env', env); console.log('✅ .env updated with CHAT_ID:', id); }"
